app.name: GoLocalChina
app.tagline: Connect with certified local guides across China
app.platform_notice: GoLocalChina is an information service platform. We connect you with independent, licensed guides — we do not organize tours.

search.title: Find Your Local Guide
search.no_results: No guides found. Try different filters.

guide.connect_note: You are requesting to connect with an independent guide. GoLocalChina facilitates this connection but is not a party to the service agreement between you and the guide.
